name: bahnlog.com
message: BahnLog is a railway transport company (EVU) and a railway infrastructure company (EIU). The EIU operates public railway infrastructure, public service facilities, and takes over private railway infrastructure.  The logistics company has been a partner and service provider for the railway since 2002.  The Homburg/Saar track maintenance yard is the only remaining of six former track maintenance yards in Saarland. From here, railway construction sites throughout the Greater Region are served. ===> Phone Number: +49 6841-189 78 60 Revenue: $6 Million Employees: 25 Data:72gb Contact: Bahnlogistik und Service GmbH Tel.: +49 6841-189 78 60 Reiner Schwarz 06841-189 7873 Christina Naumann 06841/1897860 068411897863 Daniel MüllerD-66459 Kirkel Tel: +49 16097479434 Peer Hanson Tel +49 (0) 6841-189 7869 Mobil +49 (0) 172 – 6199 056 Sabrina Linnenbach Tel +49 (0) 6841-189 78 87 Mobil: +491635576604 Jörg Michael Fries 06825 9703703 Fr.Naumann 06841/1897873 Thomas Bergmann 068411897863 buch haltung 06841/18978-64 J.M: Friesjmfries@bahnlog.copm06841 1897-867  /  -882 N.
